nasb.text: The first ripe fruits of all that is in their land, which they bring to the Lord, shall be yours; everyone of your household who is clean may eat it.

esv.text: The first ripe fruits of all that is in their land, which they bring to the Lord, shall be yours. Everyone who is clean in your house may eat it.

cnv.text: 從他們地上帶來給耶和華的初熟的物，都要歸給你們；在你家中潔淨的人，都可以吃。

ccb.text: 他们献给耶和华的一切初熟之物都归你，你家中洁净的人都可以吃。
